en.question: What is the angle between the hands of a clock at 4:30?
en.explanation: Hour=120+15=135, Min=180. |135-180|=45°. Wait: 4:30 hour hand = 4×30 + 30×0.5 = 120+15=135. Min=180. Difference=45°. But options have 55. Let me recalc: at 4:30, hour is halfway between 4 and 5 = 135°. Min at 6 = 180°. |180-135|=45°. Actually 45 is an option. Answer 45°.

en.question: A clock loses 2 min per hour. Set right at 10 AM. What will be actual time when it shows 3 PM?
en.explanation: Loses 2/60=1/30 of time. When it shows 5h passed, actual = 5×60/58×60=300×60/58≈310.3 min=5h10min. Actual ≈3:10.

hi.question: घड़ी 2 मिनट/घंटा धीमी। 10 AM सही की। जब 3 PM दिखाए तब वास्तविक समय?

en.question: If 1 Jan is Monday, what day is 31 Dec of the same (non-leap) year?
en.explanation: 365 days=52w+1d. Mon+1=Mon? No: 1 Jan Mon, 31 Dec = 1 Jan + 364 days = 1 Jan + 0w = Mon. Wait: if 1 Jan is Mon, then after 364 days (52 weeks) it's Mon again. 31 Dec is day 365 = Mon+1 = Tue. Actually 1 Jan=day1=Mon. 31 Dec=day365. 365-1=364=52 weeks. So 31 Dec = Mon. Yes, 31 Dec is also Monday.

en.question: 1 Jan 1900 was Monday. 1 Jan 2000?
en.explanation: 1900-1999=100y. 1900 not leap (century not divisible by 400). In 100y: leap=24 (1904-1996). Normal=76. Odd=24×2+76=48+76=124≡5. Mon+5=Sat.
